required_evidence: terminal corrected Salt-Q points near onset
minimum_acceptance: At least one admitted point below/near route_B_mid and one admitted point above route_A_mid, with no refit to validation/holdout rows.
A point with backflow_fraction <= 0.02 and Ri_median < 0.30, or a bounded transition pair straddling backflow_fraction 0.02-0.10.
Coarse/medium/fine or documented time-window uncertainty for backflow_fraction, Ri_median, and Nu_upcomer.

required_evidence: wall-core or wall-bulk Delta T extraction
minimum_acceptance: Wall/bulk temperature difference on the same retained window and section definition as backflow/Ri.

required_evidence: non-recirculating pressure rows or explicit recirculation-modeled F6/onset closure
minimum_acceptance: validation/holdout improvement over F3_shah_apparent without hidden global multiplier
